title: Facilities Assistant Manager (Medical)
description:
Key Responsibilities

Drive strategic facilities improvement initiatives that elevate operational excellence, ensuring full alignment with quality, safety, and contractual requirements

Ensure optimal performance and reliability of plant, building, and critical infrastructure systems through proactive maintenance and continuous improvement

Lead, mentor, and grow a high-performing Facilities Management team, fostering capability development through coaching, training, and structured performance reviews

Collaborate closely with vendors, contractors, and internal stakeholders to deliver projects, manage procurement, and resolve issues efficiently

Partner with the Head of Department on planning and decision-making, and act as Deputy when required to ensure continuity of leadership and operations


Qualifications & Experience

  • Diploma or Degree in Engineering, Building Services, Facilities Management, or a related discipline
  • Strong working knowledge of regulatory standards and statutory requirements, with the ability to ensure compliance across facilities operations
  • Excellent interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to engage effectively with internal teams, vendors, and external stakeholders
  • Proactive, solutions-oriented mindset, able to thrive in a fast-paced, operationally critical environment
  • Prior experience in a hospital or healthcare setting is an advantage, particularly in managing mission-critical facilities and compliance-driven operations

postedCompany.description: LPB Talent is a forward-looking employment solutions company founded with the belief that hiring the right person is not just about filling a vacancy but about shaping the future of organizations. We recognize that traditional recruitment processes often focus narrowly on resumes, leaving critical factors such as cultural fit, adaptability, and long-term potential overlooked. Our vision is to bridge this gap by combining technology, psychology, and human expertise to create a seamless and precise talent-matching experience. With Singapore as our base, we are committed to building a trusted platform where employers can discover candidates who not only meet technical qualifications but also resonate with the company’s values and long-term goals.
postedCompany.name: LPB TALENT SOLUTION PTE. LTD.
